prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3f23242b`.
codex_response:
`3f23242b` is now implemented as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: each green singleton becomes the center of a fixed 5-row motif, with a gray 5-cell bar two rows above, red side columns around it, and a cyan 5-cell bar embedded inside a full-width red row two rows below. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was used because it matched the official examples exactly; no correction note was needed, and no new primitive was added.

The verifier and generator are in [`verifier.py`](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3f23242b/verifier.py#L4), [`generator.py`](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3f23242b/generator.py#L34), and [`__init__.py`](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3f23242b/__init__.py#L1). The generator samples 1-3 isolated green centers in non-overlapping 5-row bands with one-row outer margins and at least one blank column outside each 5-cell bar, which keeps the distribution close to the official family. Validation passed on `3/3` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples, and the preview sheet looked on-family in a coarse visual check.
